Retiring Allowances (Former
LAWS OF TURKS &
CAICOS ISLANDS Legislative Service)(Increase) CAP. 1.13 3
Revision Date: 31 Mar 2018
CHAPTER 1.13
RETIRING ALLOWANCES (FORMER LEGISLATIVE SERVICE)
(INCREASE) ORDINANCE
AN ORDINANCE TO PROVIDE FOR THE INCREASE IN RETIRING ALLOWANCES FOR
LEGISLATORS AND FOR CONNECTED PURPOSES.
Commencement
[1 April 2016]
Short title
1. This Ordinance may be cited as the Retiring Allowances (Former
Legislative Service) (Increase) Ordinance.
Interpretation
2. In this Ordinance—
“award” has the same meaning as in the Retiring Allowances (Legislative
Service) Ordinance;
“retiring allowance” has the same meaning as in the Retiring Allowances
(Legislative Service) Ordinance.
Increase of retiring allowances
3. (1) A person who is in receipt of, or eligible for, a retiring allowance by
virtue of the Retiring Allowances (Legislative Service) Ordinance shall, if his
effective date of qualification under the Ordinance for the receipt of the retiring
allowance is as provided in the Schedule, be entitled to the retiring allowance at
the increased rate of his entitlement as stipulated in the Schedule.
(2) For the purpose of subsection (1) and the Schedule, a person’s
effective date of qualification for the receipt of a retiring allowance is the date
from which he is awarded or entitled to a retiring allowance under the Retiring
Allowances (Legislative Service) Ordinance.
Powers to amend Schedule
4. (1) The Governor may by Order published in the Gazette, amend the
Schedule.
(2) An amendment shall not be made under subsection (1) unless a draft
Order of the amendment has been laid before the House of Assembly and
approved by a resolution of the House.

Retiring Allowances (Former
4 CAP. 1.13 Legislative Service)(Increase) LAWS OF TURKS &
CAICOS ISLANDS
Revision Date: 31 Mar 2018
SCHEDULE
(Section 3)
RETIRING ALLOWANCE
The effective date of qualification for receipt of the increase in retiring
allowance is retirement prior to 2004.
OFFICE NEW ALLOWANCE
PER ANNUM
(a) Chief Minister $60,000
(b) Minister $36,000
(c) Speaker $36,000
(d) Elected Member $18,000
(e) Appointed/Nominated member $18,000
